---
title: "homework 1 plots"
format: pdf
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
sum1 <- read_csv("~/Desktop/16/CS353/sum1_runtimes.csv")
sum2 <- read_csv("~/Desktop/16/CS353/sum2_runtimes.csv")
sort <- read_csv("~/Desktop/16/CS353/sort_runtimes.csv")
inplacesort <- read_csv("~/Desktop/16/CS353/sortinplace_runtimes.csv")
```

```{r}
sum1 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = n, y = time)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Sum Timing 1")
```

```{r}
sum2 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = n, y = time)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Sum Timing 2")
```

```{r}
sort |>
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = time)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Sort Timing")
```

```{r}
inplacesort |>
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = time)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "In Place Sort Timing")
```
